title: Whats This Item?
description: This Mod adds back the What's This button from legacy console versions of the game
body:
This Mod adds back the What's This button from legacy console versions of the game

🚨**DISCLAMER!**🚨
Im not great at modding, so this was made with a lot of help with Claud AI

To use, press the programmable Button while hovering over an item to get a description

If you find any bugs please report them [here](https://discord.gg/qbhjwGQSrJ)
